title: joinvilleaceae
intro: The Joinvilleaceae rank is a family of flowering plants that are commonly known as the Joinvillea family. This family includes a small number of species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. They are characterized by having small, white or yellowish flowers and are often found in coastal and wetland areas. The Joinvilleaceae family is relatively rare and is not as well-studied as other plant families, with new research continually adding to our understanding of this unique group of plants.
